company_description: Tanium is an enterprise cybersecurity and IT operations platform that provides real-time endpoint visibility, control, and management across large-scale environments through its converged endpoint management architecture.

products.name: Tanium Autonomous IT Platform
products.description: Unified platform providing real-time visibility and control across all endpoints at enterprise scale, enabling autonomous IT operations with LEARN AI features for intelligent remediation.

products.name: Tanium Endpoint Management
products.description: Provides IT operations teams with real-time inventory, patch management, software distribution, and configuration management across all endpoints.

products.name: Tanium Threat Response
products.description: Endpoint detection and response (EDR) solution that enables security teams to detect, investigate, and respond to threats across all endpoints in real time.

products.name: Tanium Protect
products.description: Endpoint protection platform that enforces security policies, manages host-based firewalls, and controls application execution across enterprise endpoints.

products.name: Tanium Patch
products.description: Automated patch management solution that identifies missing patches and deploys updates across Windows, Linux, and macOS endpoints at scale.

products.name: Tanium Comply
products.description: Continuous compliance assessment tool that evaluates endpoints against industry benchmarks (CIS, STIG, PCI-DSS) and reports compliance posture in real time.

products.name: Tanium Asset
products.description: Real-time asset inventory and discovery solution that provides comprehensive visibility into all hardware and software assets across the enterprise.

products.name: Tanium Discover
products.description: Identifies unmanaged and rogue devices on the network, providing visibility into assets that may not have the Tanium client installed.

products.name: Tanium Vulnerability Risk & Compliance
products.description: Combines vulnerability scanning, risk scoring, and compliance reporting to prioritize and remediate security exposures across endpoints.

products.name: Tanium Deploy
products.description: Enterprise software deployment solution that distributes, installs, and manages software packages across large endpoint populations at scale.

products.name: Tanium Performance
products.description: Monitors endpoint performance metrics including CPU, memory, disk, and process activity to identify and resolve performance issues in real time.

products.name: Tanium Integrity Monitor
products.description: Provides real-time file integrity monitoring (FIM) to detect unauthorized changes to critical system files, directories, and registry keys.

products.name: Tanium Map
products.description: Visualizes network connections and service dependencies between endpoints to support incident response and network segmentation planning.

products.name: Tanium Index
products.description: Enables real-time file system indexing and search across all endpoints to support forensic investigations and data discovery.

products.name: Tanium Connect
products.description: Integration module that streams Tanium data to external SIEM, ITSM, and analytics platforms such as Splunk, ServiceNow, and Elastic.

products.name: Tanium Interact
products.description: Real-time query interface that allows operators to ask questions of all endpoints simultaneously and receive answers within seconds.

products.name: Tanium Trends
products.description: Historical trending and visualization module that tracks endpoint data over time to identify patterns and support capacity planning.

products.name: Tanium Benchmark
products.description: Compares an organization's endpoint security and operations metrics against anonymized industry peer data to identify gaps and improvements.

products.name: Tanium Impact
products.description: Analyzes user and group privilege relationships across endpoints to identify and reduce attack surface from over-privileged accounts.

products.name: Tanium Reveal
products.description: Scans endpoints for sensitive data such as PII, PHI, and PCI data to support data governance and regulatory compliance programs.

products.name: Tanium Client
products.description: Lightweight endpoint agent installed on managed devices that enables real-time communication, data collection, and action execution across the Tanium platform.

products.name: Tanium Server
products.description: Core server component of the Tanium platform that orchestrates communication between the Tanium Module Server, Zone Servers, and endpoints.

products.name: Tanium Module Server
products.description: Hosts Tanium solution modules and workbenches, extending the core platform with specialized capabilities for security and IT operations.

products.name: Tanium Zone Server
products.description: Proxy component that enables Tanium clients in DMZ or segmented network zones to communicate securely with the Tanium Server.

products.name: Tanium API
products.description: RESTful API that enables programmatic access to Tanium platform capabilities for automation, orchestration, and third-party integrations.

products.name: Tanium Cloud
products.description: Cloud-hosted delivery model for the Tanium platform that eliminates on-premises infrastructure requirements while maintaining full platform capabilities.

products.name: Tanium Training & Certification
products.description: Tanium's official training and certification program covering platform administration, security operations, and IT operations use cases.

competitive_products.competitive_context: CrowdStrike Falcon competes directly with Tanium Threat Response in the EDR/XDR market for enterprise endpoint security.
Microsoft Defender for Endpoint competes with Tanium's endpoint protection and management capabilities, especially in Microsoft-centric environments.
Ivanti Neurons competes with Tanium's endpoint management and patch management modules for enterprise IT operations.
ServiceNow ITOM competes with Tanium Asset and Discover for enterprise asset inventory and IT operations workflows.
Qualys VMDR competes with Tanium Comply and Patch for vulnerability assessment and remediation across enterprise endpoints.
Rapid7 InsightVM competes with Tanium's vulnerability and compliance modules for enterprise risk management.
HCL BigFix is a legacy competitor to Tanium in large-scale endpoint management and patch deployment.
SentinelOne Singularity competes with Tanium Threat Response in the autonomous EDR and XDR market segment.

partnership_signals.ilt_vilt: Tanium offers instructor-led and virtual instructor-led training through its Learning portal
